feature-creep.settings.enabled.name: Enable Feature Creep
feature-creep.settings.enabled.hint: Allow AI generation buttons on D&D5e item sheets.
feature-creep.settings.anthropicApiKey.h: Your Anthropic API key used to generate item setup data.
feature-creep.settings.model.name: Anthropic Model
feature-creep.settings.model.hint: Model name used for generation requests.
feature-creep.settings.maxTokens.name: Max Tokens
feature-creep.settings.requestEndpoint.h: Endpoint used for AI requests. Use a CORS-enabled relay/proxy URL (recommended) instead of Anthropic direct in browser clients.
feature-creep.settings.relayAuthHeader.h: Optional Authorization header value sent to your relay, e.g. Bearer <token>.
feature-creep.settings.replaceGeneratedE: Delete effects generated by this module before creating new ones.
feature-creep.notifications.apiKeyMissin: Set your Anthropic API key in Feature Creep settings first.
feature-creep.notifications.noDescriptio: Item description is empty. Add a description before running AI setup.
feature-creep.notifications.success: Feature Creep finished applying item setup.
feature-creep.notifications.invalidRespo: Anthropic returned an invalid response format.
feature-creep.notifications.corsBlocked: AI request blocked by CORS. Set Feature Creep "AI Request Endpoint" to a CORS-enabled relay/proxy.
feature-creep.notifications.failed: Feature Creep failed. Check console for details.
feature-creep.dialog.title: Feature Creep
feature-creep.dialog.content: Generate and apply item details, activities, effects, advancements, and Item Macro from this item description?
